eligibility_rules.notes: Demo-grade rules based on EU rail passenger rights concepts. Use as guidance for drafting requests, not legal advice.

snippets.text: If arrival is significantly delayed, passengers can request compensation/refund per operator terms and EU rail passenger rights.
Collect: operator, ticket/booking reference, journey date, scheduled and actual arrival time, and any announcements.
For cancellations, request refund or re-routing and any applicable compensation per policy.
